sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُرْدُنِيُّ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ الْعَرِيقَةِ الَّتِي تَجْمَعُ الْعَائِلَةَ وَالْأَصْدِقَاءَ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Jordanski mansaf se smatra jednim od drevnih tradicionalnih jela koja okupljaju porodicu i prijatelje oko jedne trpeze u velikim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Jordanian Mansaf is considered one of the ancient traditional dishes that gather family and friends around one table on major occasions.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ الشَّهِيرُ مِنْ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الْمَطْهُوِّ بِلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ الْمُمَيَّزِ، وَيُقَدَّمُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ الْأَصْفَرِ وَخُبْزِ الشِّرَاكِ الرَّقِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo poznato jelo sastoji se od jagnjetine kuhane u prepoznatljivom jameed jogurtu, a poslužuje se preko sloja žute riže i tankog širak hljeba.
sentences.translationEn: This famous dish consists of lamb cooked in distinctive jameed yogurt, served over a layer of yellow rice and thin shrak bread.

sentences.arabic: يُزَيَّنُ الْمَنْسَفُ عَادَةً بِاللَّوْزِ وَالصَّنَوْبَرِ الْمُحَمَّصِ، مِمَّا يُضْفِي عَلَيْهِ مَذَاقاً مَقْرْمِشاً يَتَنَاغَمُ مَعَ طَرَاوَةِ اللَّحْمِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se obično ukrašava pečenim bademima i pinjolima, što mu daje hrskav ukus koji se slaže sa mekoćom mesa.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is usually garnished with roasted almonds and pine nuts, which gives it a crunchy taste that harmonizes with the tenderness of the meat.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ سِرَّ النَّكْهَةِ الْفَرِيدَةِ يَكْمُنُ فِي جَوْدَةِ الْجَمِيدِ الْكَرَكِيِّ الَّذِي يُعْطِي الْمَرَقَ قَوَاماً كَثِيفاً وَطَعْماً حَامِضاً مُحَبَّباً.
sentences.translation: Tajna jedinstvenog ukusa leži u kvalitetu karak jameeda, koji sosu daje gustu teksturu i prijatan kiselkast ukus.
sentences.translationEn: The secret of the unique flavor lies in the quality of Karak jameed, which gives the broth a thick texture and a pleasant sour taste.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ أَهَمِّيَّةُ الْمَنْسَفِ عَلَى مَذَاقِهِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يُمَثِّلُ هُوِيَّةً ثَقَافِيَّةً تَفْتَخِرُ بِهَا الْأَجْيَالُ وَتُحَافِظُ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Značaj mansafa nije ograničen samo na njegov ukus, već on predstavlja kulturni identitet kojim se generacije ponose i kojeg čuvaju.
sentences.translationEn: The importance of Mansaf is not limited to its taste only, but it represents a cultural identity that generations are proud of and preserve.
